channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Open in Obsidian - Mon Jun 29 14:08:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
Open the current file's matching Obsidian note with one click. If your project root contains an .obsidian folder, it is treated as an Obsidian vault. The toolbar...
vendor: Andrii Kovalenko downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.akovalenko.obsidian-toolbar

item.title: AI Lingshi - Mon Jun 29 12:16:08 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: jgma downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.zenmark.plugin
